# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
  name: myWebAppVM
  location: eastus
  properties:
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: Standard_DS1_v2
    storageProfile:
      imageReference:
        publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
        offer: WindowsServer
        sku: 2022-Datacenter
        version: latest
      osDisk:
        name: myWebAppOSDisk
        createOption: Attach
        diskSizeGB: 64
      dataDisks:
        - name: myWebAppDataDisk
          createOption: Attach
          diskSizeGB: 2048
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
        - name: myWebAppNIC
          primary: true
          ipConfigurations:
            - name: myWebAppIPConfig
              subnet:
                id: /subscriptions/<subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group_name>/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/<virtual_network_name>/subnets/<subnet_name>
    osProfile:
      computerName: myWebAppVM
